raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX  - fraudulent transaction of {$690.00} XX/XX/XXXX  - received monthly billing statement, alerted Home Depot of the fraudulent transaction XX/XX/XXXX  - Home Depot acknowledges claim A few months pass. Home Depot initially reverses the charges, but in XXXX deems us liable for the transaction. 

XXXX and XX/XX/- we discover that a new credit card had been mailed to us, activated and used without our permission ( we still had the old credit card in our possession ). We send evidence via a police report and USPS claim of mail theft, including of the new credit card from XX/XX/XXXX. Pending response from Home Depot. 

They are holding us liable for the initial fraudulent transaction of {$690.00} and three months of late fees at this point.
